data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding the fee policy for declined offers, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this aspect. The linked use case mentions the fee policy if an offer is declined, yet the evidence does not include any transactions or states that confirm this policy is implemented or enforced. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the fee policy for declined offers.
gaps: No evidence of fee policy enforcement if an offer is declined after acceptance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
